issues.detail: The skill description lacks step-by-step instructions, making it ambiguous for users to implement without prior knowledge.
The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases such as invalid input or database failures.
While code examples are provided, missing context like database initialization and authentication functions reduce the ability to run the code directly.

scenarios.name: basic-yoga-setup
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses createSchema + createYoga together, wires NODE_ENV into maskedErrors and graphiql, and implements Subscription.newUser.subscribe via pubsub.subscribe; baseline uses makeExecutableSchema and an async generator without NODE_ENV gating.

scenarios.name: yoga-plugins-hardening
scenarios.rationale: Treatment registers useResponseCache, useRateLimiter, and useDepthLimit from the Yoga plugin packages with full config; baseline reaches for incorrect package names and falls back to validationRules-style depth limiting.
